message:
refactor(diary): Improve path handling and add statistics helpers

This commit enhances the diary module with better path handling and
prepares for future statistics functionality.

## Path Handling Improvements (diary.ts)

### Configurable cass Path
- exportSessionSafe() now accepts cassPath parameter instead of hardcoding 'cass'
- Enables use of custom cass installations or wrappers
- Passed through from config.cassPath in generateDiary()

### Proper Path Expansion
- saveDiaryEntry() now uses expandPath() for config.diaryDir
- Ensures ~ and other path shortcuts are properly resolved
- Uses ensureDir() helper instead of raw fs.mkdir()

### Import Cleanup
- Added expandPath and ensureDir to imports from utils.js
- Removed redundant comment on getSanitizeConfig import

## Tracking Module Updates (tracking.ts)

- Minor improvements for consistency with other modules
